name: Seg2Grasp: A Robust Modular Suction Grasping in Bin Picking
summary: arXiv:2607.17757v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current bin picking methods that rely heavily on end-to-end learning often falter when confronted with unfamiliar or complex objects in unstructure...
description: arXiv:2607.17757v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current bin picking methods that rely heavily on end-to-end learning often falter when confronted with unfamiliar or complex objects in unstructured environments. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Seg2Grasp, a modular pipeline designed for robust suction grasping in dynamic and cluttered bin scenarios. Seg2Grasp is built on a three-ste...
author: Hye-Jung Yoon, Juno Kim, Yesol Park, Jun-Ki Lee, Byoung-Tak Zhang
